title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on the foundation day of Khalsa Panth and Baisakhi
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings on the foundation day of Khalsa Panth and Baisakhi

This sacred day reminds us of the establishment of the Khalsa Panth by Sri Guru Gobind Singh Ji
On this auspicious occasion, I extend my heartfelt greetings to the Khalsa Panth and bow to the hard work of our annadatas

Posted On:
14 APR 2026 12:46PM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah today extended his greetings to the people on the occasion of the foundation day of the Khalsa Panth and Baisakhi.

In a post on X, Shri Amit Shah said, “Heartfelt greetings to everyone on the foundation day of the Khalsa Panth and the festival of Baisakhi. This sacred day reminds us of the establishment of the Khalsa Panth by Sri Guru Gobind Singh Ji, an inspiration that gives us the courage to walk fearlessly on the path of truth and righteousness. Baisakhi is also a celebration of the joy of our hardworking farmers, whose dedication brings prosperity across the nation. On this sacred and auspicious occasion, I extend my heartfelt greetings to the Khalsa Panth and bow to the tireless efforts of our annadatas.”

ਖ਼ਾਲਸਾ ਪੰਥ ਦੇ ਸਾਜਨਾ ਦਿਵਸ ਅਤੇ ਖੇਤਾਂ ਦੀ ਖ਼ੁਸ਼ਹਾਲੀ ਦੇ ਪ੍ਰਤੀਕ ਵਿਸਾਖੀ ਦੇ ਤਿਉਹਾਰ ਦੀਆਂ ਲੱਖ-ਲੱਖ ਵਧਾਈਆਂ।
ਅੱਜ ਦਾ ਦਿਨ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸਿੰਘ ਜੀ ਵੱਲੋਂ ਖ਼ਾਲਸਾ ਪੰਥ ਦੀ ਸਾਜਨਾ ਦੀ ਯਾਦ ਦਿਵਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ। ਇੱਕ ਅਜਿਹਾ ਪਵਿੱਤਰ ਦਿਹਾੜਾ ਜੋ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਨਿਡਰਤਾ, ਸੱਚਾਈ ਅਤੇ ਧਰਮ ਦੀ ਰਾਹ ‘ਤੇ ਚੱਲਣ ਦੀ ਪ੍ਰੇਰਣਾ ਦਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ।…
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
April 14, 2026



*****

RK/PR/PS/SC

(Release ID: 2251801)
